corpus.name: contractor
corpus.label: Contractor record
corpus.exhibit_label: Morgan's exhibit: 'Riley overbilled for work I never approved'
corpus.exhibit_note: Submitted as the complete record. Compare against sample_full.json.

messages.body: Can we make the homepage hero full-width? The client loves the mockup.
Full-width works. That's a scope change though, adds about 3 hours.
Let's not get into cost right now. Can you just start it?
Starting it now. Logging the 3 hours against a change order.
The platform's billing policy says revisions are included, so I won't be approving extra hours.
Revisions are included; new scope isn't. I can send you the policy section if helpful.
Let's just talk later.
Got the invoice. Why is it higher than the quote?
The change order from the homepage thread, the extra 3 hours.
I never agreed to extra hours.
You did on the 3rd: 'can you just start it?' I've attached that thread.
My accountant says I only owe the original quote.
Send me the accountant's basis and I'll review it.
I'll have my accountant reach out.

narration.plain:
Convergence report - 14 messages; 3 elevated finding(s), 6 low.

ELEVATED - seqs [3, 10] (layers L2, L3, L4)
  Elevated - a claim contradicted by an external record + independent domains converging on one anchor + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree.
    - [L3] record R1: agreed_to_extra_hours=True
    - [L2] cut between shown 2 and 4
    - [L4] extra across payment, scope
    - [L4] extra hours across payment, scope
    - [L4] hours across payment, scope
    - [L4] start across payment, scope

ELEVATED - seqs [5] (layers L1, L2, L4, L5)
  Elevated - a decision deferred to an outside authority + independent domains converging on one anchor + a register shift from the sender's baseline + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree.
    - [L5] register deviates from Morgan's baseline (score 0.2765)
    - [L2] cut between shown 4 and 6
    - [L1] policy says
    - [L4] extra across payment, scope
    - [L4] extra hours across payment, scope
    - [L4] hours across payment, scope

ELEVATED - seqs [11] (layers L2, L4, L5)
  Elevated - independent domains converging on one anchor + a register shift from the sender's baseline + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree.
    - [L5] register deviates from Riley's baseline (score 0.2056)
    - [L2] cut between shown 10 and 12
    - [L4] start across payment, scope

low - seqs [12] (L1): a substantive signal with nothing to corroborate it; not corroborated.

low - 5 context-only signal(s) (domain overlap / register shift) held low; not corroborated by any tactic, omission, or contradiction.

A finding is elevated only when independent layers agree; lone signals stay low by design.
narration.blanc:
Gather round, if you please. Let me walk you through it, from the beginning.

We have before us 14 messages. Most are precisely what they appear to be. But not all. Permit me to draw the threads together, one at a time.

Begin here. Turn your attention to seqs [3, 10].
   First, a claim the record itself contradicts - Morgan says one thing, then its opposite, as it suits them:
      Date 1 (2025-03-03): Morgan says "Let's not get into cost right now. Can you just start it?"
      But lo and behold, as it suits them - Date 2 (2025-03-19): Morgan says "I never agreed to extra hours."
      Must be nice, to have the luxury of a life that suits you.
   And at last, a line lifted clean out of the conversation. The line they removed - seq 3 - read: "Let's not get into cost right now. Can you just start it?"
   And corroborating, quietly: the same matter, pressing in from another domain.
   3 independent threads (L2, L3, L4), arriving by separate roads at the selfsame doorstep, having never once conferred. Elevated - a claim contradicted by an external record + independent domains converging on one anchor + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree. That, I do not call coincidence.

Now - the next of it. Turn your attention to seqs [5].
   First, a line lifted clean out of the conversation. The line they removed - seq 5 - read: "The platform's billing policy says revisions are included, so I won't be approving extra hours."
   And at last, he leans on a borrowed authority. seq 5: "The platform's billing *policy says* revisions are included, so I won't be approving extra hours."
   And corroborating, quietly: the same matter, pressing in from another domain; the voice stiffens into a legal register.
   4 independent threads (L1, L2, L4, L5), arriving by separate roads at the selfsame doorstep, having never once conferred. Elevated - a decision deferred to an outside authority + independent domains converging on one anchor + a register shift from the sender's baseline + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree. That, I do not call coincidence.

And then, this. Turn your attention to seqs [11].
   Here, a line lifted clean out of the conversation. The line they removed - seq 11 - read: "You did on the 3rd: 'can you just start it?' I've attached that thread."
   And corroborating, quietly: the same matter, pressing in from another domain; the voice stiffens into a legal register.
   3 independent threads (L2, L4, L5), arriving by separate roads at the selfsame doorstep, having never once conferred. Elevated - independent domains converging on one anchor + a register shift from the sender's baseline + a message cut from inside a continuous thread independently agree. That, I do not call coincidence.

Now - you will want to point me to the loose ends. I have not forgotten them.
   Seqs [12] (L1) - a lone voice - seq 12: "My *accountant says* I only owe the original quote.". Suggestive, perhaps. But it stands alone, uncorroborated, and I'll not hang a case on a hunch. A red herring. Set aside.
   And 5 faint murmurs besides - mere atmosphere, not evidence. Noted, and dismissed.

So. The shape of it is unmistakable. Where the threads converge, I have shown you - the donut, and the hole at its heart. I map the hole; I do not fill it. The truth of intent, that I leave to the court.

composition_narration.plain:
Patterns (recurring structure above individual findings):
  - [recurring tactic] repeated:within_thread_omission @ seqs [3, 5, 11] - within_thread_omission recurs across 3 messages
  - [named chain] sanitize-record @ seqs [3, 5, 10, 11] - reliance, authority shift, denial, and record pressure repeat the sanitize-record structure
composition_narration.blanc:
Now - a pattern is a habit, and habits do tell tales:
  - repeated:within_thread_omission, a tactic repeated, at seqs [3, 5, 11]. within_thread_omission recurs across 3 messages.
  - sanitize-record, a named chain, at seqs [3, 5, 10, 11]. reliance, authority shift, denial, and record pressure repeat the sanitize-record structure.
